overall settings.title: Dating
overall settings.description:
Your Indian mother has decided it's time. She's fine with you having a ❤️ love marriage, but if you don't find someone soon, she has in mind a match with a well-off family. The problem is that they're ugly! First, [talk things over with your Maa](/play/event/66?subject_id=56), then make a visit to either {violet|the church or the bar} to start meeting people.

Work odd jobs to earn cash. The right clothes are important to impress people.

*The initial setup aims for generally acceptable standards. If you make it explicit and want to share the file, then be considerate by including a warning.*

items.name: Aloe Vera
items.description: Soothe sunburn or other skin irritations. Quantity is in uses — 10 per bottle. Often used multiple times over a day or two.

items.name: Ate
items.description:
One meal a day is enough, typically in the evening. If you don't eat, you'll feel weak the next day.

The hours are averaged for meals over a whole day.

items.name: Bible
items.description: Best bring one of these to church meetings, or else it may be hard to follow the discussion. Also, it helps you fit in.

items.name: Calendar
items.description: Shows date and time information.

items.name: Cash
items.description: Either cash on hand or funds at the bank.

items.name: Convo Maa 1a
items.description:
प्यारे बेटे, तुम्हें बड़ा देखकर मुझे बहुत खुशी हुई।
Pyaare bete, tumhe bara dekhkar mujhe bahut khushi hui.

Lovely son, I am so happy to see you all grown up.

items.name: Convo Maa 1a2 RomanScript
items.description: Kindly use roman letters.

items.name: Convo Maa 1b
items.description:
मैं भी तुमसे प्यार करता हूँ, माँ।
I love you too, Maa.

items.name: Convo Maa 1b-r
items.description:
Main bhi tumse pyaar karta hoon, maa.
I love you too, Maa.

items.name: Convo Maa 1c
items.description:
लेकिन तुम ठीक से नहीं खा रहे हो, और अब एक मैच ढूंढने का समय है!
But you're not eating enough, and it's time to find a match!

items.name: Convo Maa 1c-r
items.description:
Lekin tum thik se nahin kha rahe ho, aur ab ek match dhoondhne ka samay hai!
But you're not eating enough, and it's time to find a match!

items.name: Convo Maa 1d
items.description:
अब वहाँ बहुत सारी लड़कियाँ हैं कि तुम उनकी तरफ भी नहीं देख रहे!
There are now so many girls out there that you are not even looking in their direction!

items.name: Convo Maa 1d-r
items.description:
Ab wahan bahut saari ladkiyan hain ki tum unki taraf bhi nahi dekh rahe!
There are now so many girls out there that you are not even looking in their direction!

items.name: Date
items.description:
To plan dates with different people at the same time, you'd need to save and duplicate this item. But there are several ways that could get you into trouble.

It's up to you to choose the location thoughtfully — there's no event that selects randomly for you.

items.name: Drink—Beer
items.description: Not going to impress anyone, but sufficient for anyone looking to have a good time. Raises **Intoxication** by 1 point.

items.name: Drink—Margarita
items.description:
Raises **Intoxication** by 1 point, enough to feel good without causing any difficulty driving or interacting with people. To get truly drunk, buying harder liquor would be cheaper.

For both yourself and someone else, you'd need to buy two glasses.

items.name: Feet—Loafers
items.description: Easy to put on although not the most secure.

items.name: Feet—Low Heels
items.description: Good for work or spending time with friends, not hiking or sports.

items.name: Feet—Sandals
items.description: Ideal for the beach, can also be worn casually without socks.

items.name: Food—Burger and Fries
items.description:
The homemade version is healthier than it sounds, a grilled hamburger loaded with onions, tomatoes, mushrooms, peppers, and spinach, wrapped in lettuce instead of a bun, with steamed broccoli on the side.

The version found at fast food restaurants however is high in sugar and low in nutrients, likely adding to your waistline and generally not feeling your best.

items.name: Food—Burger and Fries Ingredients
items.description: A bit expensive but doesn't take too long to roast.

items.name: Food—Chef Salad
items.description: Comes in a large wooden bowl.

items.name: Food—Daal and Rice
items.description: With aloo gobi on the side. A decent standard meal although a bit high in carbs.

items.name: Food—Daal and Rice Ingredients
items.description: Cheap but takes awhile to cook.

items.name: Full Body—Plain Black Dress
items.description: Good for a variety of occasions including work and free time.

items.name: Full Body—Revealing Leather Dress
items.description: The bottom of the skirt rests just above the knees.

items.name: Gas Stove
items.description: A gas cylinder sits on the floor, connected to the stove by a tube.

items.name: Hours
items.description:
The basic measure of time needed to accomplish things. Starts at sunrise with 24 hours left, so the 24th hour is just before dawn the next day.

You don't need to to account for all the hours each day, but be realistic about how much could happen in a single day.

items.name: Job Listing 1
items.description:
Use the sequence of 3 events to "read" this listing: **Location, Hours,** and **Wages.** Then do the same for the other listing.

After reading, go to the listing you plan to apply for and **Circle Job Listing.** If it doesn't work out, then you may circle the other one afterwards. *Note: the recipes are for information only.*

items.name: Job Listings—New
items.description:
Purchase a newspaper from the store, or have it delivered every morning with a subscription, or buy local online news from a computer.

Two jobs are posted every weekday. If a posting is listed then it's guaranteed to be available for the day, though you'll still need to apply. Otherwise, there's a small chance of finding a job by asking around.

items.name: Job—Circled
items.description:
Circle a job listing, then visit the location to apply.

Typically, you'd work one job per day, but there could be time for two short jobs. Getting dirty in the first job makes this harder. You may need to change clothes or shower in between, and consider how far away the locations are.

If the job is from asking directly at the site instead of a listing, then roll for hours and wages here.

items.name: Legs—Jeans
items.description: Nothing special, but passable away from home.

items.name: Legs—Swim Trunks
items.description: Not necessarily immodest if a guy wears these at a public place to swim. Could be attractive if he's fit.

items.name: Mem1
items.description: Store and recall memory for event effects.

items.name: Mem2
items.description: Store and recall memory for event effects.

items.name: Petrol
items.description: Takes **1** Liter each way, **2** round trip.

items.name: Phone
items.description:
You can call or text anyone with relationship status **Acquaintance** or higher, or people you know who aren't potential matches. Doesn't have an event—use narratively.

Everyone is assumed to be carrying a phone unless e.g. swimming.

items.name: Rested
items.description: Based on how many hours of sleep you've had, and whether you've been eating.

items.name: Sleep
items.description: Consider how much you've done today and how many hours would likely be left available for sleeping. If you've already worked 10 hours then there's probably not a lot of time for much else.

items.name: Torso—Button Shirt
items.description: Decent looking shirt.

items.name: Torso—Polo Shirt
items.description: Short sleeves, for activities that involve moving around while still looking somewhat formal.

items.name: Towel
items.description: To dry off or wrap around.

items.name: Washing Machine
items.description: Removes dirt from clothes. Doesn't work on people — use a shower for that.

items.name: Work
items.description: Apply for a job, then produce per hour until the limit is reached, earning cash.

locations.name: Beach
locations.description:
Might be a good place to bring a date, or happen to run into someone you're interested in. Strangers might not appreciate advances here though, even if they're hot.

There's swimming, sand volleyball, or jogging on the beach for exercise.

Jobs include rentals, lifeguard, and surfing instructor.

locations.name: Bowling Alley
locations.description: Slippery shoes included. Cost for a game is 20 cash, and that covers the whole group.

locations.name: Church Corner Room
locations.description:
The Young Singles group meets in the back corner room, with cement walls that get damp when the humidity is high enough. There's plenty of room, so it's fine as long as other people show up and no one is unreasonably argumentative.

Sturdy plastic-covered metal chairs are arranged in a circle, offering places to sit once it's time to officially start.

The first week's topic is Proverbs 21:9, "Better to live on a corner of the roof than share a house with a quarrelsome wife. (NIV)" *Make this fun with an AI discussion. Give it a personality that likes to quote verses out of context and draw questionable conclusions.*

locations.name: Church Sanctuary
locations.description: Where Sunday morning services and mid-week meetings take place.

locations.name: Cinema
locations.description:
One or two new movies come out each week, but there is also a large selection of classic movie showings for cheaper tickets.

Available jobs: ticket vendor, popcorn popper, play button presser, clean sticky floors.

locations.name: Claudia's House
locations.description: Within walking distance of the church.

locations.name: Department Store
locations.description:
All the name brands. Buy better clothes, maybe one day even a ring.

Available jobs: outfit fetcher, checkout counter, security monitors.

locations.name: Downtown
locations.description: The lights are much brighter, and the night life as well as the day life is humming.

locations.name: Electronics Store
locations.description: Available jobs: customer assistant, product returns, repair squad, checkout register.

locations.name: Friendly Community Church
locations.description:
The message board out front says, "All are welcome. So don't blame the pastor when someone else as bad as you comes!"

If your character is religious, then this is one of the best places to meet like-minded people. If not, you could go the dark route of trying to seduce some good girls and lead them astray.

Services are Sunday mornings, young singles group is Monday evenings, and mid-week meetings are Wednesday evenings. There are also retreats from time to time, and special activities such as assisting at homeless shelters.

A few paid jobs are available: childcare, printing bulletins, landscaping.

locations.name: Gym
locations.description:
Improve your fitness and perhaps meet people. South wing of the **Rec Center.**

Available jobs: yoga instructor, masseuse, pick up weights, pool scraper.

locations.name: Happy Hour Pub
locations.description:
Where else would you go to blow off steam and have a good time? There's certain to be people here to meet. The only question is whether the types who frequent this joint are worth your time.

Even if you'd normally consider yourself too moral to indulge in such a lifestyle, you could still choose someone less worthy (but good-looking) in an attempt to get them back on the right road.

Available jobs: drink mixer, piano man, bouncer, bathroom cleaner.

locations.name: Outskirts
locations.description: Generally a bit more relaxed, and lower crime, than the main part of the city.

locations.name: Petrol Station
locations.description:
Not only sells petrol but also any kind of vehicle maintenance, from selling wipers to repainting and replacing engine parts.

Available jobs: pump receipt printing, oil changer, mechanic, order parts from catalog.

locations.name: Rec Center
locations.description: The main hall has a high ceiling where indoor soccer and volleyball tournaments take place. Sign-up sheets are available to join one of the rec leagues, and there are metal bleachers to sit and watch.

locations.name: River Walk
locations.description: Cafes and restaurants line the cobblestone pathway. Paddle boat rentals are available, though they're relatively expensive in comparison with rentals on the beach.

locations.name: Supermarket
locations.description:
Good prices for everyday items, such as:
* Groceries
* Over-the-counter medicine
* Toiletries
* Basic clothes

Available jobs: stocker, bagger, cashier, alcohol scanner.

locations.name: Teria's Place
locations.description:
Cafeteria style restaurant — go through the line and ask for what to put on your plate. A variety of options: noodles, meat, salads.

The owner named the place after his daughter. To meet her, start setting her up by duplicating one of the other characters.

Available jobs: server, cook, dish washer.

locations.name: Your Backyard
locations.description: Luxurious — three in-ground swimming pools, far more than your grandparents in India. Only they're all very small, about ankle deep.

locations.name: Your Bathroom
locations.description:
Before getting in the shower, flip on the small water heater for a few minutes.

In a drawer is toothpaste and other toiletries. A shelf contains towels. The door has a hook for a bathrobe.

locations.name: Your Bedroom
locations.description:
Being single and living at your parents' house, this is the one true area of personal space. A dressor is against one wall, and there's also a closet with hangers. A window looks out to an old but healthy tree.

On a bookshelf is *How to feel good about yourself on dates* and *A guide to not feeling lonely*. Might be best to hide those if anyone comes to visit.

locations.name: Your Home
locations.description: It may not be the finest in the land, but it's nothing to be ashamed of either.

locations.name: Your Kitchen
locations.description: Gas stove, refrigerator, dining table for six. Cupboard with utensils and dishes, many of them metal.

locations.name: Your Neighborhood
locations.description:
Part way between downtown and the outskirts, this neighborhood is well positioned to get somewhere easily.

On the street is a bus stop with routes downtown. Deduct an hour whenever you use the bus.

locations.name: Your Single Bed
locations.description:
The mattress isn't worn out, comfortable enough unless the day has been too stressful to sleep. Held by slats in a wooden frame.

While you *could* fit another person in, it'd be better to buy a bigger bed.

locations.name: Zelest's House
locations.description:
An old house with white siding.

Within walking distance of the bar. The streets are well lit at night, but it's still not a great part of town, so she doesn't love walking alone.

characters.name: Art
characters.description:
Holding Sydney's hand. His name means "bear" in Celtic.

Plays guitar. Leads the worship music on Sunday mornings and Wednesday evenings.

characters.name: Baast
characters.description: Popular local musician. He's dark, good-looking, and smooth talking. Middle eastern features, but no foreign accent.

characters.name: Claudia
characters.description: Neatly dressed young woman with braided long brown hair. Looks welcoming but someone who should be greeted respectfully.

characters.name: Claudia's Parents
characters.description: No surprise, her family cares about each other.

characters.name: Daveed
characters.description: Leads the young singles' group. Also young and single himself. Prematurely balding, but with a warm personality, even if overeager.

characters.name: (Enter a name)
characters.description:
College has left little time for social life, until now. With a few months' holiday, this is the perfect time to reawaken that hidden charisma and those stifled interpersonal skills.

The default setup is male seeking female, configurable of course.

Also, you could change the win conditions, for example, having a baby with someone who you're in a committed relationship with. The goal probably shouldn't merely be a certain **Feels** score, as that is a general metric rather than an objective status.

characters.name: Drechsel
characters.description: Bartender. Has a knack for bottles, jars, and mixes.

characters.name: Maa
characters.description: Only wants the best for you, and makes sure to let you know what that is. Which includes eating, good grades, avoiding dangerous sports, and of course, finding a favorable match.

characters.name: Minister Breece
characters.description: The preacher. Passionate middle-aged man who enjoys making spiritual comparisons to rugby, from his time playing in college.

characters.name: Sydney
characters.description: Athletic. The guy in the plastic white chair next to her is holding her hand. Does that mean they're seeing each other exclusively?

characters.name: Volvo S60
characters.description: A car that shows someone who likes things done right. Faster than waiting for the bus.

characters.name: Zelest
characters.description: A young woman, but judging from her appearance, not a "lady." Auburn shoulder-length hair. Loves dancing even if she's not particularly skilled at it.

characters.name: Zelest's Stepdad
characters.description: A lowlife. Zelest would probably prefer her mom sent him away, but he doesn't usually bother her, so it's fine.

attribs.name: Arousal
attribs.description:
Physical arousal. **1** could be considered average for a person of whatever age they are, while negative values indicate feeling sluggish or cold. The number temporarily increases in steamy situations, up to around **100.**

Reset to **1** when meeting someone again on a new day.

attribs.name: Beauty
attribs.description:
Let's face it, some of us have it, and some of us don't. Although they do say that beauty is in the eye of the beholder.

This is about genes, skin weathering, preference, or makeup. For weight and health, see [Fitness](/configure/attrib/4).

attribs.name: Birth Control
attribs.description: Set to true if wearing a condom, on the pill, spermicide, or monthly cycle planning. The "early withdrawal" method does not count.

attribs.name: Can Lecture
attribs.description: 1 if true, otherwise 0

attribs.name: Can Listen to Lecture
attribs.description: 1 if true, otherwise 0

attribs.name: Charisma
attribs.description: Being persuasive and likeable is useful for lots of things.

attribs.name: Clean
attribs.description:
For example, spilled drink on clothing. Factors include how long since showered, and clothing washed.

State of a person — not tracked by specific item of clothing.

attribs.name: Clothing Score
attribs.description: Set up to 10 based on how well and appropriately dressed for the current situation.

attribs.name: Days Counter
attribs.description: A simple running total, not necessarily important for months or seasons. Rather, used for example to track how long someone stays angry before they're willing to talk with you again.

attribs.name: Feels about You
attribs.description:
A key metric to determine how NPCs will respond to you. Somewhat subjective and variable.
```
Love:          above 50
Like:         20 to  49
Interested:    1 to  19
Uninterested: -1 to -19
Dislike:     -20 to -49
Loathe:       below -50
```

attribs.name: Fitness
attribs.description: Scale from professional athletes down to overweight gamers who never leave the basement.

attribs.name: Gift Bonus
attribs.description: Provides temporary boosts to certain rolls.

attribs.name: Hours Per Visit
attribs.description: How many hours it takes for a typical visit to a certain location.

attribs.name: Intelligence
attribs.description: Measured by whether a person can calculate tips correctly, or how many lines of Shakespeare they can recite. Whether that makes conversations more interesting or not depends on who is listening.

attribs.name: Intensity of Act
attribs.description: For a positive response to a more intense physical act, your partner will probably need to be significantly aroused.

attribs.name: Intoxicated
attribs.description:
Even a little (1-2) could be relaxing. A moderate amount (5) is unsafe to drive under, while a lot (7-10) could mean acting wildly or even passing out.

Wears off after sleeping or waiting awhile.

attribs.name: Modesty
attribs.description:
10 for fully modest, primarily based on wearing clothes in the right context. Wearing only underwear at home alone is not an issue, while neglecting to wear proper clothes in public could very well be.

If a person's clothes aren't listed but they have a reasonable modesty stat (or not shown), then that implies they're wearing normal clothes.

Behaving lewdly or erotically can lower modesty even with clothes on.

attribs.name: Relationship Status
attribs.description:
This character's romantic status with you.
Only applies to potential romantic partners.
Arranged by how difficult it is to move to that level.

attribs.name: Relevant Skill
attribs.description: General attribute to set based on the situation. For example, if dancing is relevant, then set this value to your **Dancing Skill.** If no skills apply to the situation then set to **5.**

attribs.name: Similar Personality
attribs.description:
Sometimes it's more important to be similar than to be great. Tells roughly how much you have in common with them.

To set for someone, run their **Similar Personality—Calculate** event.

attribs.name: Their Action
attribs.description: List for **Choose Action** event.
enum_list: Shares about family she cares about
Points at someone else in the room
Lies about interest in other partners
Lies about past with other partners
Demand to know about your interest in them
Demand to know about your interest in others
Bumps into something and gets a bruise
Gets angry at what you say
Gets angry at what they see you do
Gets angry at what you forgot to do
Active game such as ping pong
They ask you a truth question
Wants to go out and have fun

attribs.name: Their Attitude
attribs.description:
How the NPC typically interacts.

- **Burned:** Cynical and guarded based on past experience.
- **Dutiful:** Loyal to family; their own needs are secondary.
- **Unstable:** Can easily turn from hot to cold.
- **Wild:** Dislikes rules and wants to try new things spontaneously.
- **Flirty:** Friendly or seductive with just about anyone.
- **Crude:** Enjoys talking dirty, poor table manners.
- **Aggressive:** Hot tempered and also quick to arousal.
- **Domineering:** They expect to be in control.
- **Fearful:** Quiet and hesitant to speak up, preferring to avoid problems.
- **Distrustful:** Jealous and questioning.
- **Secretive:** Tends to lie and cover up motivations.

attribs.name: Their Goal
attribs.description:
What the NPC hopes to achieve. Supporting this goal is important for furthering a relationship.

- **Wealth:** Career-driven or looking for a rich or ambitious partner.
- **Stability:** Build a quiet, safe life.
- **Excitement:** Avoid mundane existence, boring jobs or school.
- **Discovery:** Create or learn new things that may improve the world.
- **Positivity:** Deal with toxic parents, friends, or online comments.
- **Noble Cause:** Feed the poor or join a political movement.
- **Saving Myself:** Believes in waiting until marriage.
- **Hookup:** Looking for one-night stands, anything to get into bed.
- **Wounded:** Trying not to dwell on their recent breakup.
- **Revenge:** Angry at someone or something.

attribs.name: Their Tone
attribs.description: List for **Choose Tone** event.

attribs.name: Who
attribs.description: List for **Chance Encounter—Who.**

events.name: Act of Service
events.description: Do something thoughtful for the other person. For example, repairing an appliance, buying something they or their family member needs, or supporting a cause.

events.name: Apply For Job
events.description:
Visit the circled location to apply. (If you're at the wrong location then the outcome will go deeply negative, guaranteeing failure).

Adjust your **Clothing Score** before rolling.

events.name: Ask Available Jobs
events.description: Can ask at each location once a day. If you've already read a job listing for this location today, then there's no need to ask.

events.name: Ask Out On Date
events.description:
The date must be a literal date, that is, decide together on a future day and place. 

- If they accept, then go to **Date** and set the location.
- Default is tomorrow, so you can keep that or change it.

events.name: Chance Encounter
events.description:
Before rolling, go to a place you might run into someone, for example the **River Walk.** It could also be while you're working, although most often, customers are random people you may never meet again.

- On **Minor Success,** roll **Who** to see which person is there.
- On **Major Success,** you can choose who shows up, or keep rolling **Who** until someone you want is selected.

events.name: Chance Encounter—Who
events.description: Move the selected person to your location, then engage in conversation.

events.name: Choose Action
events.description: Ask what an NPC you're interacting with romantically decides to do next. Also roll **Choose Tone.**

events.name: Choose Tone
events.description: Roll and use to interpret the outcome of **Choose Action.**

events.name: Circle Job Listing
events.description: Use a bright colored marker to circle this job listing.

events.name: Convo Maa 1 Start
events.description: Resolve and apply, then go to **Convo Maa 1a** (item).

events.name: Date Outcome
events.description: Roll at the end of the date. One of the most important ways to improve how they feel about you.

events.name: Feeling Adjustment
events.description:
Change the value based on the narrative, including chance.
For example, `1d4 +2` (*dice* 1, *sides* 4, *bonus* 2).

events.name: First Impression
events.description:
Based on appearance and greeting, people may like you, dislike you, or (maybe worse if you want to be noticed) have no opinion about you.

Set **Clothing Score** and **Similar Personality** before rolling.

events.name: Getting Pregnant
events.description:
Success means she **does** get pregnant, even if this is not what you want.

- *No birth control:* **5/50** chance (10%)
- *Birth control:* **2/50** chance
- *Double birth control:* still a **1/50** chance by rolling *Natural Max*

events.name: How an Advance is Received
events.description:
Does the person draw back or are they happy about the initiative taken. For example, attempt to hold their hand. The attempt could be physical or spoken.

For actions that are primarily about being physical and erotic rather than emotional, use **Steamy Action** instead.

events.name: Next Day
events.description:
Sets date/time and adjusts **Rested** status.

Add or remove any daily subscriptions here. Currently subscribed to the local newspaper.

events.name: Preserve Relationship
events.description: Attempt to avoid losing the relationship.

events.name: Propose Next Level
events.description:
Attempt to advance the relationship, for example, marriage proposal. If successful, change the **Relationship Status** of that person.

Some status changes, such as **Love Interest,** can be set unofficially and do not require a roll.

On failure, it would be best to wait before trying again. To try again without waiting, increase the difficulty by one class each time.

events.name: Similar Personality—Calculate
events.description: Compares how close you are in charisma, intelligence, modesty, and fitness.

events.name: Steamy Action
events.description:
Immediate physical focus takes priority over emotional feelings once the mood is right. This could be a bedroom scene or any physically focused situation such as dancing or making out.

Clothing bonus may change based on what fits the new situation better. Adjust **Intensity of Act,** and for daring acts relative to current arousal, increase difficulty.

*Minor Failure* incurs a small penalty, and *Major Failure* generally indicates that your attempted action gets rejected.

events.name: Their Goal—Roll
events.description: When you first meet a prospective match (Claudia, Zelest, or a new character you add), roll to set their goal, then their attitude.

events.name: Visit Location
events.description: Simple event to keep track of hours whenever you visit a location.
